Chuan Wang.entity_description: Chuan Wang is a researcher in computational linguistics, focusing on multilingual processing and discourse parsing.

Hongmin Wang.entity_description: Hongmin Wang is a scholar in the field of natural language processing, with a focus on discourse and language understanding.

Conll 2016 shared task.entity_description: The CoNLL 2016 shared task is an event focused on multilingual shallow discourse parsing, involving various researchers and contributions in the field.

Yasuhisa Yoshida.relationship_description: Jun Suzuki is also an author of the research paper that presents the dependency-based discourse parser.

Jun Suzuki.relationship_description: Yasuhisa Yoshida is one of the authors of the research paper that discusses the dependency-based discourse parser.

Tsutomu Hirao.entity_description: Tsutomu Hirao is a researcher or author involved in the development of discourse parsers and their applications in summarization.

Masaaki Nagata.entity_description: Masaaki Nagata is a researcher or author who has contributed to the field of natural language processing, particularly in discourse parsing.

Dependency-based discourse parser.entity_description: A computational tool designed to analyze and summarize text by understanding the dependencies between words and phrases.

single-document summarization.entity_description: A method in natural language processing that focuses on creating a concise summary from a single document.

Proceedings of the 2014 Conference on Em.vector_source_id: Proceedings of the 2014 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP)
